fixTarget.title: Fix this target
fixTarget.pr_ready: PR-ready patch (Experimental, not tested. Expected to work as interface for external agents( Jules , Cursor agent, etc.))
fixTarget.loadError: Could not load the analysis prompt.
fixTarget.noScan: Run a scan first to generate a fix prompt.
fixTarget.hint: Paste the copied text into Cursor, ChatGPT, Copilot, or your IDE assistant. Edit the prompt below if needed.
fixTarget.stage2Blurb: Export markdown, copy PR fields, and open your host (GitHub / GitLab) without granting SimpleSecCheck repo write access.
fixTarget.noParsedRemote: No GitHub/GitLab URL detected in source — downloads and copy still work; paste links manually.
fixTarget.stage3Blurb: Experimental / not tested. Branch locally, open a PR, let CI run tests. Optional example workflow file for post-PR reminders — not wired to your instance.

legal.cookieNoticeText: This site uses essential cookies for login and session management. See the privacy policy for details.
legal.pageDisabledBody: This instance has no public legal pages enabled.
legal.signupTermsRequired: Please accept the terms of service and privacy policy.
legal.adminIntro: Legal notice, privacy policy, and terms for public instances with user accounts. Terms acceptance is required at registration.
legal.adminCookieNotice: Show cookie notice (essential auth cookies only)
legal.adminTermsEnable: Terms of service — required at registration
legal.adminHosting: Hosting provider (for privacy policy AVV section)
legal.setupIntro: Public websites in Germany/EU typically need a legal notice and privacy policy. You do not need to take the site offline — fill in the required fields or disable this for internal-only use.
legal.setupEnable: Show legal notice & privacy in footer
legal.setupEnableHint: Recommended for public / network deployments. Optional for solo/internal.
legal.setupTerms: Terms of service — recommended with real user accounts

warnings.missing_company_name: Legal notice: company or name is missing.
warnings.missing_email: Legal notice: contact email is missing.
warnings.terms_recommended: Terms of service are recommended when user accounts are enabled.
